S.FORM: Nemanja Bjelica hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing / pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 5, Nemanja Bjelica, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: nemanja ő≤jeli ¶~ ®a ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč / pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, nemanja ő≤jeli ¶~ ®a, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
